Campeonato Distrital por Equipas da AX Porto 2025/2026

Organizer(s)Associação de Xadrez do Porto
FederationPortugal ( POR )
Tournament directorAXP
Chief ArbiterAXP
Time control (Standard)90' + 30" por cada lance
LocationSedes dos Clubes
Number of rounds8
Tournament typeSwiss-System for teams
Rating calculationRating national, Rating international
Date2026/01/03 to 2026/04/18
Rating-Ø / Average age1514 / 32
Pairing programSwiss-Manager from Heinz Herzog, Swiss-Manager tournamentfile

Last update 10.02.2026 10:33:11, Creator/Last Upload: fpxporto

Parameters No tournament details, Link with tournament calendar
